caption: A person's hands are shown working on a handmade greeting card set against a light-colored wooden surface. The card is vertically oriented, featuring a split-background design with a brown section on the left and a light blue section on the right. On the brown side, there is a white rectangular label with the text "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer" in a mix of serif and script fonts. Silver floral patterns are embossed across the bottom of the brown section. The person wears a metallic watch on their left wrist. Throughout the sequence, the person uses their fingertips to press down and secure the card, shifting their grip slightly from the top edges toward the sides and bottom. A light blue envelope and a small piece of patterned paper are partially visible on the left side of the workspace.
